title: biscutella apula var. depressa
intro: Biscutella apula var. depressa, also known as Alpine Pennycress, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Biscutella apula var. depressa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
